description_long: This is a heavily weathered, rectangular metal toaster with a dark, rusted exterior and visible corrosion patches. The toaster features two wide slots on top, one of which contains a single, partially burnt slice of bread. The surface is mottled with areas of rust and discoloration, giving it an aged, neglected appearance. A lever is visible on one side, likely used to lower and raise the bread, and a small protruding knob or button is present near the base. The toaster's overall form is boxy, with slightly rounded edges and a utilitarian design. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, emphasizing its functional, industrial look.
description: A rusted, rectangular metal toaster with two wide slots and a burnt slice of bread, featuring heavy corrosion and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing a large, rusted panel and a burnt slice of bread protruding from one slot.
description_view_1: Narrow end view highlighting the lever mechanism and the top slots with the bread visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with extensive rust and corrosion, showing the bread from a different angle.
description_view_3: Narrow end view without the lever, focusing on the plain, rusted surface and the open slots.
attribute_control_knobs: One small, rectangular lever on the side; no visible dials or labeled settings.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide, rectangular slots on top, spaced evenly, with visible interior and one containing bread.
